descFull: Drop-in design system for Unity 6 UI Toolkit (UIDocument + PanelRenderer, UXML + USS): tokens, 24 components, 63 icons, mobile-responsive, dark-themed. One stylesheet, zero dependencies. Battle-tested in a shipping cross-play game.
